# Madurai Murugan Tours and Travels

> Taxi rental and tour package service based in Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. We provide cars, SUVs, and tempo travellers with drivers for local sightseeing, outstation trips, and multi-day tour packages across Tamil Nadu and Kerala.

Contact: +91 99946 67622 / +91 90879 67622 | murugantravelsmadurai7@gmail.com | WhatsApp: https://wa.me/+919994667622
Address: No 63, Madakulam Main Rd, Palangantham, Madurai, Tamil Nadu 625003, India
Bookings can be made by phone, WhatsApp, or the booking form on the homepage.

## Vehicle Rentals

- [Innova Crysta Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/innova-crysta-rental-in-madurai): 7-seater premium SUV with driver
- [Innova Hycross Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/innova-hycross-rental-in-madurai): 7-seater hybrid SUV with driver
- [Etios or Dzire Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/etios-or-dzire-rental-in-madurai): 4-seater sedan, budget option
- [Ertiga Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/ertiga-rental-in-madurai): 7-seater MPV
- [Tempo Traveller Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/tempo-traveller-rental-in-madurai): 12-seater AC tempo traveller for group travel
- [Force Urbania Rental in Madurai](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/force-urbania-rental-in-madurai): 18-seater AC luxury van for large groups

## Tour Packages

- [Madurai to Rameshwaram Tour Package](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/madurai-to-rameshwaram-tour-package): Rameshwaram and Dhanushkodi day trips and overnight packages
- [Chennai Tour Packages](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/chennai-tour-packages): Tour packages starting from Chennai
- [Chennai Local Sightseeing Tour](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/chennai-local-sightseeing-tour): One-day Chennai city tour
- [Chennai to Mahabalipuram and Kanchipuram Tour](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/chennai-mahabalipuram-kanchipuram-tour): Heritage day trip from Chennai
- [Chennai to Pondicherry Tour Package](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/chennai-pondicherry-tour-package): Pondicherry trip from Chennai
- [Chennai to Tirupati Tour Package](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/chennai-tirupati-tour-package): Tirupati darshan trip from Chennai
- [Coimbatore Tour Package](https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/coimbatore-tour-package): Tour packages from Coimbatore including Ooty and Valparai

## Popular Destinations We Cover

- Madurai: Meenakshi Amman Temple, Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace, Gandhi Memorial Museum, Koodal Azhagar Temple, Kallazhagar Temple, Vandiyur Mariamman Teppakulam
- Nearby: Rameshwaram, Dhanushkodi, Kanyakumari, Kodaikanal, Trichy, Thiruvannamalai
- Kerala: Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey, Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Poovar

## Pricing

Tariffs are listed on the homepage per vehicle: day rent plus per-kilometre fuel charge below 300 km, or a flat per-kilometre rate above 300 km. Hourly local packages are also available. See https://maduraimurugantoursandtravels.com/#service for current rates.
